subject: Re:
body:
no go today

----- Original Message ----
From: Catherine Derby <catherinederby@hotmail.com>
To: jeeproject@yahoo.com
Sent: Thursday, March 15, 2007 9:20:22 AM
Subject: 


I go to Oscar Blandi at 3PM, same guy who did Dana's hair.  Cross your 
fingers. But I also see the psychologist at 5PM.  And then I'm going to the 
island tomorrow. Would it be ok if I cancel my therapy til next week?  I 
don't want GM to get upset with me being out even though I am on track with 
all of my work.  I just don't want to upset her. Let me know.

And thank you!
